top_apps.name: BLFFD
top_apps.description_short: Outsmart friends in BLFFD! Create clever lies, find the truth, and win.
top_apps.description_excerpt:
BLFFD is the ultimate digital party game where your ability to lie is just as important as your knowledge. Designed for 2 to 20 players, this high-stakes trivia game challenges you to create the most believable fake answers to trick your friends while you try to hunt down the actual truth. Whether you are hosting a small game night or a massive online gathering, BLFFD delivers a seamless and competitive experience that keeps everyone on their toes.

The game flow is designed to be fast-paced and engaging. It begins in the Lobby, where the host can customize settings including language, total rounds, and categories. Once the game starts, the system shuffles the turn order and assigns a Chooser. This player selects a category, and our smart deprioritization algorithm picks a question that players in the room have seen the least, ensuring every round feels fresh and unpredictable.

During the Bluffing phase, everyone must submit a fake answer. To keep the game challenging and fair, BLFFD features a sophisticated cross-language blocking system. It checks your submission against the correct answer and its synonyms across all supported languages. If your bluff is too close...

Who's the Impostor?

Impostor Football is a party game for 3–15 players on a single device. No downloads. No accounts. Just gather around and play.

HOW IT WORKS

Each round, everyone gets a secret footballer. The Crew knows who they got. The Impostors don't — and must bluff their way through.

Take turns describing your player without saying their name. The Crew drops real hints. The Impostors listen carefully and fake it.

When the talking stops, it's time to vote. Point the finger. Catch the Impostors — or let them walk free.

Whether you are hosting a small game night or a massive online gathering, BLFFD delivers a seamless and competitive experience that keeps everyone on their toes.

The game flow is designed to be fast-paced and engaging. It begins in the Lobby, where the host can customize settings including language, total rounds, and categories. Once the game starts, the system shuffles the turn order and assigns a Chooser. This player selects a category, and our smart deprioritization algorithm picks a question that players in the room have seen the least, ensuring every round feels fresh and unpredictable.

top_apps.description_excerpt:
Вы сирота. Странствующий мастер фэншуй нашёл вас неподалёку от кладбища совсем крохой и воспитал как родное дитя. Перед смертью он передал вам запертую шкатулку — единственную нить, ведущую к вашему прошлому. После его похорон вы отправляетесь на поиски истины.
Первая зацепка приводит вас к ветхому многоквартирному дому. Вы вселяетесь в одну из его квартир и вскоре понимаете, что с ним что-то не так...

- В пустых коридорах слышен потусторонний шёпот.
- На проклятой стройке снова и снова гибнут люди...
Вы думаете, что попали в историю о призраках, но со временем осознаёте: всё намного страшнее.
Ведь истинный ужас вселяют не мёртвые, а живые.

Особенности игры:
Посмотрите в глаза своим страхам и раскройте тайны далёкого прошлого.
Объединяйте улики, чтобы приблизиться к истине.
Будьте внимательны: любая мелочь может оказаться важной зацепкой.
Решайте головоломки, погрузившись в неповторимую атмосферу этой таинственной истории.

top_apps.description_short: Large Card Solitaire Game: Play the CLASSIC card game you know and love now!
top_apps.description_excerpt:
Vigor Solitaire is an Exclusive Classic Solitaire Game for Senior Citizens. With large cards and an eye-friendly easy-to-use interface, this game is the best way to play the CLASSIC card game you know and love for FREE, offline and online!

The addictive game you’ve been playing on your computer for years, classic Solitaire, also known as Patience, now goes wherever you do. Vigor Solitaire is the ideal app for the best casual gaming experience that will help you recharge your batteries and sharpen your mind!

How to Play:
Just tap or drag cards to arrange them in descending order with alternating number, colors and suits. When you can, move cards to the foundation to sort all suits from Ace to King. Only a King or a pile starting with a King can be placed in an empty space on the Solitaire Tableau. You can play it your way, with a 1 card or 3 card draw, and choose between classic or Vegas scoring.

Exclusive Features:
- Classic Solitaire: staying true to the original gameplay
- Unlimited deck of cards: There are always a new patience solitaire card game to play
